cli-no-blueprint.body: No cairn.blueprint found. Inspection has nothing to look at.
cli-no-blueprint.cta: Run `cairn init` to scaffold a blueprint, then re-run `cairn check`.
cli-no-blueprint.heading: No blueprint found

map-clean.body: All nodes reconciled. No drift detected.
map-clean.heading: Map clean

map-failed.body: The graph data is missing or malformed. Check the cairn ui server and try again.
map-failed.heading: Map failed to load

no-blueprint.body: No cairn.blueprint found. Run `cairn init` to create one.
no-blueprint.heading: No blueprint found

no-filter-matches.body: No findings match the current filters.
no-filter-matches.heading: No matches

no-nodes.body: No nodes declared in the blueprint.
no-nodes.heading: No nodes

node-artefacts-failed.body: Artefacts failed to load. Check the cairn ui server, then reselect the node.

node-no-beads.body: No beads link to this node.
node-no-beads.heading: No beads

node-no-contracts.body: No contracts are attached to this node.
node-no-contracts.heading: No contracts

node-no-inbound.body: No other nodes depend on this one.
node-no-inbound.heading: No inbound dependencies

node-no-outbound.body: This node has no outbound dependencies.
node-no-outbound.heading: No outbound dependencies

node-no-paths.body: This node has no source paths declared.
node-no-paths.heading: No paths declared

node-no-research.body: No research artefacts link to this node.
node-no-research.heading: No research

node-no-sources.body: No source artefacts reference this node.
node-no-sources.heading: No sources

node-no-todos.body: No open tasks for this node.
node-no-todos.heading: No tasks

errors.migrate-dsl: No blueprint file was found. Rename `cairn.dsl` to `cairn.blueprint`.

feedback.usage: usage: cairn feedback "<what you expected, what happened instead>"

CAIRN_CONTRACT_MISSING.cta: Create a contract artefact describing this node's interface.
CAIRN_CONTRACT_MISSING.heading: Missing contract

CAIRN_CONTRACT_MISSING_NODE.body: A contract references `{node}`, which does not exist in the blueprint.
CAIRN_CONTRACT_MISSING_NODE.cta: Fix the node reference in the contract, or declare the missing node.
CAIRN_CONTRACT_MISSING_NODE.heading: Contract references unknown node

CAIRN_DECISION_ORPHANED.body: Decision `{node}` references nodes that no longer exist.
CAIRN_DECISION_ORPHANED.cta: Update the decision's node references, or archive if no longer relevant.
CAIRN_DECISION_ORPHANED.heading: Orphaned decision

CAIRN_INTEGRITY_DUPLICATE_ID.body: The ID `{node}` appears more than once in the blueprint.
CAIRN_INTEGRITY_DUPLICATE_ID.cta: Rename one of the duplicates to make every ID unique.
CAIRN_INTEGRITY_DUPLICATE_ID.heading: Duplicate node ID

CAIRN_INTEGRITY_INVALID_EDGE_ENDPOINT.body: An edge references `{target}`, which does not exist in the map.
CAIRN_INTEGRITY_INVALID_EDGE_ENDPOINT.cta: Check the edge declaration for typos, or declare the missing node.
CAIRN_INTEGRITY_INVALID_EDGE_ENDPOINT.heading: Invalid edge endpoint

CAIRN_INTEGRITY_PATH_TIE.cta: Narrow one node's path pattern so each file has exactly one owner.
CAIRN_INTEGRITY_PATH_TIE.heading: Path ownership conflict

CAIRN_INTERFACE_HASH_CHANGED.body: The contract hash for `{node}` no longer matches the last recorded value.
CAIRN_INTERFACE_HASH_CHANGED.cta: Run `cairn scan` to accept the new hash, or revert the contract change.
CAIRN_INTERFACE_HASH_CHANGED.heading: Interface changed

CAIRN_ORDER_CYCLE.cta: Break the cycle by removing or reversing one edge.
CAIRN_ORDER_CYCLE.heading: Dependency cycle

CAIRN_PROVENANCE_NO_DECISION.body: Node `{node}` has no decision in its provenance chain.
CAIRN_PROVENANCE_NO_DECISION.cta: Link a decision artefact explaining why this module exists.
CAIRN_PROVENANCE_NO_DECISION.heading: No decision link

CAIRN_RECONCILE_ORPHANED_FILE.body: The file `{path}` exists on disk but no blueprint node claims its path.
CAIRN_RECONCILE_ORPHANED_FILE.cta: Add a `path` entry to an existing node, or declare a new node.
CAIRN_RECONCILE_ORPHANED_FILE.heading: Orphaned file

CAIRN_SOURCE_UNVERIFIED.body: Source `{node}` has not been verified against its declared hash.
CAIRN_SOURCE_UNVERIFIED.cta: Run `cairn scan` to verify, or update the source record.
CAIRN_SOURCE_UNVERIFIED.heading: Unverified source

CT001.body: Targets for `{node}` with the same contract role have divergent interfaces.
CT001.cta: Review the contract and reconcile the interface shapes.
CT001.heading: Interface contradiction

CT002.body: An intentional asymmetry was detected in `{node}` for contract role `{target}`.
CT002.cta: Review the rationale to confirm the asymmetry is still correct.
CT002.heading: Intentional asymmetry

severity.error: Error: a blocking issue that must be resolved.
severity.info: Info: an observation with no required action.
severity.warning: Warning: a potential issue worth reviewing.

types.extra-edge: A declared edge has no observed source dependency.
types.ghost-node: A declared node has no source files on disk.
types.interface-contradiction: Multiple contracts for the same role have divergent interfaces.
types.missing-edge: An observed dependency has no declared blueprint edge.
types.orphaned-file: A source file exists but no node owns its path.
types.rationale-tension: An intentional asymmetry was detected; review the rationale.

init.next-steps:
Next steps:
  1. Describe your system in cairn.blueprint (a starter was written)
  2. Run `cairn scan` to reconcile the blueprint against your code
  3. Append .cairn/AGENTS.md to your agent instructions (CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md)

Existing codebase? `cairn init --from-code` discovers modules for you.
